message:
fix(codegen): Fix builder vs self.emit in random, uuid, site modules

Three modules were using ZigBuilder methods (emitInlineBlockRaw) which
write to the builder's internal buffer instead of NativeCodegen's output.
This caused expressions like random.random() to generate empty code.

Fixes:
- random_mod.zig: genRandom() now uses self.emitInlineBlockStart/End
- uuid_mod.zig: genGetnode() now uses self.emitInlineBlockStart/End
- site_mod.zig: genGetuserbase() and genGetusersitepackages() now use
  self.emitInlineBlockStart/End

Also fixed genChoice() trailing space issue - withInlineBlock checks
for trailing ';' but space after semicolon caused double semicolons.
